description: Look like the king of fashion in these nubuck boots from id. The contrast laces add to the class of the footwear, while the foamy footbed keeps you comfortable all day long.UpperNubuck leather upper for maximum durability and styleTapered toe for comfort and styleLace-up system for a snug, customised FitLightly padded tongue and collar for a great snug fitCentral lacing system bordered with serrated edges for added style and longevityStitch detailing to enhance shoe lifeMidsoleFull length EVA midsole for comfort and supportCushioned footbed for added comfortOutsoleLightweight, slip-resistant textured rubber outsole for better shock absorptionShoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a nubuck brush to clean the upperDo not store in direct sunlight
